{"id":"smallhold-f4k","title":"GET /@username: minimal server-rendered profile page","description":"Implement a minimal HTML profile page at /@username. Shows: display name, bio (HTML rendered), avatar (if set), post count, follower/following counts, recent posts list. This is what people see when they paste a smallhold profile URL into a browser or share it on social media.

Agent workflow: No subagents needed — this is a small, self-contained HTML template.

Test discipline:
- Test that HTML is valid (use html5ever or just check for required elements)
- Test that bio HTML is sanitized (ammonia) — no script tags
- Test that unknown username returns 404

Defensive programming:
- All user-generated content (display name, bio) must go through ammonia sanitization before embedding in HTML
- Do not embed post content directly — link to individual post pages","acceptance_criteria":"Profile page renders with correct display name and bio; unknown username 404; bio HTML is sanitized; page includes open graph meta tags for social sharing","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:58Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:58Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-5l8","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:29:03Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
